title: Communauté de communes du Bocage Bourbonnais
summary: The communauté de communes du Bocage Bourbonnais is a communauté de communes, located in the Allier department of the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region of France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Bourbon-l'Archambault. Its area is 735.7 km2, and its population was 13,705 in 2020.
text:
The communauté de communes du Bocage Bourbonnais is a communauté de communes, located in the Allier department of the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region of France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Bourbon-l'Archambault. Its area is 735.7 km2, and its population was 13,705 in 2020.
